S.FORM: O Li I-siw (Holam: 李易修; Pe̍h-ōe-jī: Lí E̍k-siu; 1988 a miheca saka 6 a folad saka 10 a romi'ad－ saka) cecay YouTuber i Taywan. Kwoli Taywan Sihan Daigak a mico^yap.
S.PHON: o~u ɾi i-siw (ħo~uɾam: ***; pə*ħ-*ə-j*: ɾ* ə*k-sio~u~u; **** a miħəʦa saka * a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ* saka) ʦəʦaj jo~uo~u~uto~u~ub~b~vər i tajwan. kwo~uɾi tajwan siħan ɬ~ɮai*ak a miʦo~uʔjap.
S.FORM: O Li I-siw (Holam: 李易修; Pe̍h-ōe-jī: Lí E̍k-siu; 1988 a miheca saka 6 a folad saka 10 a romi'ad－ saka) cecay YouTuber i Taywan. Kwoli Taywan Sihan Daigak a mico^yap.
S.PHON: o~u ɾi i-siw (ħo~uɾam: ***; pə*ħ-*ə-j*: ɾ* ə*k-sio~u~u; **** a miħəʦa saka * a fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ saka ** a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ* saka) ʦəʦaj jo~uo~u~uto~u~ub~b~vər i tajwan. kwo~uɾi tajwan siħan ɬ~ɮai*ak a miʦo~uʔjap.
